Not a super original idea, sorta just taking from the first chapter. But I didn’t see a lot of good Rize bots so I wanted to make my own.

Luna Snow next, I promise. The personality is done, I just needed time to think of an idea that hadn’t been done before.

Wesghost dropped the rest of the songs to his new album. Honestly I’m not a huge fan of Sadeyes, but the others are good. Braindead feels very edgy but good nonetheless.

Speaking of Wesghost THIS SONG FITS SO WELL

Actually put a lot of effort into this bot, hope you guys like it.
